When I say I want to help families with the cost of living, I mean it. by John Swinney Read More News Vote SNP for bold action on the cost of living and our NHS Posted on 16 April, 2026 Read John Swinney’s full speech at the SNP’s 2026 manifesto launch. Make it both votes SNP on Thursday 7th of May for a government that’s on your side. by John Swinney Read More News SNP 2026 Manifesto: Always on Scotland’s side Posted on 16 April, 2026 1 May, 2026 The SNP is always on your side. On May 7th choose a Scottish Government that works for Scotland. Make it both votes SNP. by the SNP Read More News Scotland fans must not be priced out of the World Cup Posted on 5 April, 2026 5 April, 2026 John Swinney has called on FIFA to end dynamic pricing for World Cup tickets after supporters were hit with eye-watering costs to follow Scotland this summer. by the SNP Read More News We are standing on the verge of a truly historic moment Posted on 26 March, 2026 28 April, 2026 Read First Minister John Swinney’s speech launching the SNP’s 2026 Election Campaign. by John Swinney Read More News First Minister John Swinney’s speech to the SNP’s 2026 Campaign Conference Posted on 14 March, 2026 14 March, 2026 Our message in this election is simple. Your First SNP vote elects an SNP Government. And your second SNP Vote delivers independence. by John Swinney Read More News A nation renewed, built by the wealth of our resources and our people. Posted on 25 February, 2026 25 February, 2026 That is the prize for Scotland and it is the fresh start offered by independence. by John Swinney Read More News What a vote for the SNP means Posted on 16 February, 2026 20 April, 2026 Only with the SNP can the people of Scotland guarantee that they always have a Scottish Government that’s always on Scotland’s side. by the SNP Follow us on social media Follow Scottish National Party on Facebook Follow Scottish National Party on Instagram Follow Scottish National Party on Twitter Follow Scottish National Party on Youtube Follow Scottish National Party on Linkedin Back to top Further information Take action News Policies Parliamentarians Donate Jobs Prize Draws Contact Contact Scottish National Party Gordon Lamb House 3 Jackson's Entry Edinburgh, Scotland EH8 8PJ tel: 0800 633 5432 email: info@snp.org Promoted by the Scottish National Party, Gordon Lamb House, 3 Jackson's Entry, Edinburgh, Scotland,
